documentation.text:
CommitmentRegistry - On-chain IdR (Identity Registry) for ShieldLogin.
 Stores Semaphore commitments for anonymity set / Merkle tree in ZK proofs.

typeDescriptions.typeString: struct CommitmentRegistry.Entry storage ref[] storage ref

documentation.text: @notice Add a commitment. isSemaphore=true includes it in getSemaphoreCommitments() for ZK group.
